key_insights.insight: Caloric restriction has strong evidence supporting its effectiveness as a longevity intervention.
key_insights.quote: Chloric restriction has compelling evidencethat it's one of the most effective lunglongevity interventions that can be done.

key_insights.insight: It is more effective to put your body on autopilot using data-driven protocols than to rely on mental willpower for diet and health choices.
key_insights.quote: If you think about putting your body on autopilotI call it my autonomous self but the body report out evidence algorithm in and it just runsthis is the result this is autopilot for my body and so every single thing we do isis tracked in the body

key_insights.insight: Every supplement or food should have a measurable and quantifiable benefit to justify its consumption.
key_insights.quote: every pill has to justify its existence if it can't be measured andquantified we don't do it

key_insights.insight: Both NR and NMN are effective at increasing intracellular NAD levels.
key_insights.quote: I showed that both were basically effectivein doing the objective.So I was able to peg my intracellular NADat the 18-year-old mark on both supplements.

key_insights.insight: Pick a health protocol and measure its effect on your biomarkers to iterate and improve.
key_insights.quote: So you need to pick a path and then measure.

key_insights.insight: Highly processed sugars offer no nutritional value to the body.
key_insights.quote: But highly processed white sugar or cane sugar, there's no value for your body.

key_insights.insight: When you are on a calorie restriction diet, supplementing with testosterone is important to maintain healthy levels.
key_insights.quote: I supplement because I'm on a caloric restriction diet. And when you do that, your testosterone naturally goes down.

actionable_advice.advice: Adopt a zero sugar policy for processed sugars.
actionable_advice.how_to: Eliminate white sugar and cane sugar from your diet, focusing on getting sugars from whole foods like berries instead.

actionable_advice.advice: Automate health routines by building them into existing habits.
actionable_advice.how_to: Integrate new health practices like red light therapy or applying hair growth treatments into existing routines, such as morning preparations or bedtime.

actionable_advice.advice: Fight against hair loss with a multi-pronged approach.
actionable_advice.how_to: Use a combination of custom topical treatments, red light therapy, PRF injections, and supplements.

memorable_stories: Transformed by experience living in extreme poverty in Ecuador, sparking mission to improve human race globally.
Sold Braintree Venmo at 34 for a few hundred million dollars, then devoted his life to longevity.
contrarian_claims: Suggests that Blueprint is the best health protocol ever developed and challenges others to prove it wrong with data, advocating for data-driven health decisions over guru advice.
The idea that you can eat the same meal, customized for ideal health, every single day.
Claims that there is 'no value' for your body from highly processed white sugar or cane sugar
